pom.xml.general_idea: Update the minimum required Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the target runtime.
Replace the deprecated Nexus Staging Maven Plugin with the new Central Publishing Maven Plugin for Maven Central deployment.
Adjust compiler arguments to enable all lints and suppress specific warnings relevant to Java 21 module system and Error Prone integration.
Update OpenRewrite recipes to target Java 21 migration patterns instead of Java 17.
Enable PitMute feature in Pitest to suppress known mutations using a CSV file.
Add a new PMD execution to generate code metrics using the custom metrics renderer.
Split Surefire executions to separate standard tests from ArchUnit architecture tests for better reporting.
Update Error Prone configuration to disable specific rules and adjust warning levels for the new version.
Update RevAPI configuration to handle SpotBugs annotations and improve JSON report formatting.
Bump versions of various dependencies (JUnit, Mockito, Checkstyle, etc.) to their latest compatible releases.
Bump versions of Maven plugins (Compiler, Javadoc, PMD, etc.) to their latest releases.
Add maven-dependency-plugin execution to expose dependency versions as properties for use in other plugins.
Switch PMD core and Java dependencies to the custom metrics-enabled versions.
Update OWASP Dependency-Check configuration to include OSS Index credentials and adjust format.
Configure maven-release-plugin commit messages to include skip CI tags.
pom.xml.human_impl: <scmDevelopmentCommitComment>@{prefix} Prepare for next development iteration [skip ci]</scmDevelopmentCommitComment>

pom.xml.general_idea: Enable sorting of dependency exclusions in sortpom plugin configuration.
Add new template configurations for AssertJ assertions generator plugin.
Add build-helper-maven-plugin to plugin management for potential future use.
Add versions-maven-plugin to plugin management for dependency version management.
Enable printing of failing errors in PMD executions for better visibility.
Update PMD JavaScript source roots to use project.basedir instead of basedir.
Disable failing the build on RevAPI problems in the development profile.
Update Surefire argLine to include logging config and Mockito agent.
Update Failsafe argLine to include logging config and Mockito agent.
Update maven-enforcer-plugin to require the build version of Java instead of a hardcoded version.
Remove explicit distribution management configuration as it is handled by the new central publishing plugin.
Remove unnecessary exclusion of jsr305 from spotbugs-annotations.
Add exclusion for junit-platform-engine in equalsverifier dependency.
Bump the internal codingstyle configuration and library versions.
Bump the project version to 6.0.0-SNAPSHOT.
Minor text updates in the project description.
pom.xml.human_impl: — I am using this coding style ... as the parent of your own POM

.github/auto_assign.yml.general_idea: Change the GitHub auto-assign configuration to add reviewers instead of assignees for pull requests.
.github/auto_assign.yml.human_impl:
addReviewers: true
addAssignees: false
reviewers:
  - uhafner
numberOfReviewers: 0

.github/dependabot.yml.general_idea: Remove the version ignore rule for json-unit-assertj to allow Dependabot to update it to newer versions.
Add ignore rules for datatables.net-responsive and datatables.net-responsive-bs5 to prevent Dependabot from updating them beyond version 3.0.2.
.github/dependabot.yml.human_impl:
+    ignore:
+      - dependency-name: datatables.net-responsive
+        versions:
+          - "> 3.0.2"
+      - dependency-name: datatables.net-responsive-bs5
+        versions:
+          - "> 3.0.2"

.github/workflows/check-md-links.yml.general_idea: Bump the checkout action to a newer major version.
Replace the markdown link checking action with a different tool (linkspector).
Update configuration parameters to match the new link checker tool's requirements.
.github/workflows/check-md-links.yml.human_impl:
- check-modified-files-only: 'no'
- config-file: '.github/check-md-links.json'
+ github_token: ${{ secrets.github_token }}
+ reporter: github-pr-check
+ fail_on_error: true
+ filter_mode: nofilter
+ config_file: '.github/linkspector.yml'
+ level: 'info'

.github/workflows/ci.yml.general_idea: Update the CI matrix to test against JDK 21 and 25, removing JDK 17 to align with the new minimum version requirement.
Disable fail-fast in the CI strategy to allow all matrix combinations to complete even if one fails.
Upgrade the GitHub Actions checkout action from version 4 to version 6.
Upgrade the GitHub Actions setup-java action from version 4 to version 5.
Update the Maven version used in CI from 3.9.9 to 3.9.11.
Add the 'ci' Maven profile to the build command to enable CI-specific configurations.
Add the 'no-ui-tests' Maven profile to the build command to skip UI tests in CI.

.github/workflows/enforce-labels.yml.general_idea: Switch the workflow trigger from pull_request to pull_request_target to allow the workflow to run with permissions of the target repository.

.github/workflows/run-release-drafter.ym.general_idea: Update the release-drafter GitHub Action to version 6.1.0.

.github/workflows/sync-labels.yml.general_idea: Update the checkout action to a newer major version to maintain compatibility with current GitHub Actions runtime.
Switch from micnncim/action-label-syncer to brpaz/action-label-syncer, likely due to maintenance status or feature requirements.

.github/workflows/update-dependencies-gr.general_idea: Update the checkout action to a newer major version to ensure compatibility and access to latest features.
Update the setup-java action to a newer major version.
Upgrade the CI environment to use JDK 25 instead of JDK 21.
Update the Maven version used in the CI pipeline to a newer patch release.
Ensure the working directory is up-to-date with the remote before committing changes to avoid conflicts.

doc/dependency-graph.puml.general_idea: Update codingstyle-pom version to 5.43.0-SNAPSHOT in the dependency graph documentation.
Update codingstyle version to 5.27.0 in the dependency graph documentation.
Update spotbugs-annotations version to 4.9.8 in the dependency graph documentation.
Add jsr305 version 3.0.2 to the dependency graph documentation.
Update error_prone_annotations version to 2.46.0 in the dependency graph documentation.
Update commons-lang3 version to 3.20.0 in the dependency graph documentation.
Update commons-io version to 2.21.0 in the dependency graph documentation.
Update streamex version to 0.8.4 in the dependency graph documentation.
Add dependency link from spotbugs-annotations to jsr305 in the dependency graph documentation.
